events.title: Israeli Airstrike Kills Seven in South Lebanon
events.desc: An Israeli airstrike on the southern Lebanese town of Saksakiyeh resulted in at least seven fatalities, including a child, and left 15 injured, according to the Lebanese health ministry. The Israeli military stated they targeted Hezbollah militants planning attacks, and the incident's details are under review.

events.title: Hezbollah Claims Drone Attack on Israeli Troops
events.desc: Hezbollah announced Saturday that it targeted Israeli troops in northern Israel with a drone, as retaliation for repeated Israeli strikes on Lebanon, despite an ongoing truce. The group also claimed drone and rocket attacks on Israeli military targets within Lebanon.

events.title: Iranian Guards Threaten U.S. Sites Over Tanker Attacks
events.desc: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps threatened to target U.S. sites if its tankers face attacks, as Washington awaited Tehran's response to its latest negotiating position. This statement follows U.S. strikes on two Iranian tankers in the Gulf of Oman.

events.title: U.S. and Iran No Closer to Ending War Amid Gulf Clashes
events.desc: The U.S. and Iran remain distant from a resolution to their war, with exchanges of fire in the Gulf occurring despite a fragile ceasefire. The United Arab Emirates also faced renewed attacks. U.S. intelligence suggests Iran could withstand a naval blockade for months.

events.title: Israeli Settlers Force Re-burial of Palestinian Man
events.desc: Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank reportedly compelled Palestinians to exhume the body of an 80-year-old man, Hussein Asasa, hours after his burial in Asasa village near Jenin. The family stated the exhumation and re-burial were forced by settlers near a settlement re-established by the Israeli government.

events.title: UK Deploys Warship to Middle East for Potential Hormuz Mission
events.desc: Britain announced the deployment of its warship HMS Dragon to the Middle East in preparation for a potential multinational effort to secure shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. The vessel was previously sent to the Eastern Mediterranean in March following the commencement of the Iran war.

events.title: Nine Killed in Lebanon as Israel Intensifies Strikes
events.desc: Israel conducted extensive strikes across Lebanon on Saturday, resulting in at least nine deaths in the south and attacks on a highway near Beirut, outside traditional Hezbollah areas. These raids represent some of the most intense activity since a three-week truce began, which has failed to halt daily exchanges of fire.

events.title: Gaza Flotilla Activists to Be Deported After Release from Israeli Detention
events.desc: Two activists, Saif Abu Keshek (Spanish) and Thiago Avila (Brazilian), arrested during the interception of a Gaza-bound flotilla, are expected to be deported after their release from Israeli security detention. They were part of a flotilla attempting to deliver aid to Gaza and break the Israeli blockade.

events.title: Three Police Officers Killed in Northwest Pakistan Car Bomb Attack
events.desc: A car bomb attack in Bannu, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, northwest Pakistan, killed three police officers and several fighters. The bomber detonated an explosives-laden vehicle near a security post.

events.title: One Killed in Gaza Amid Turkish Peace Efforts with Hamas
events.desc: One person was killed in Gaza as the Turkish Foreign Minister engaged in peace talks with a Hamas official. Israel's military actions continue, with hundreds reported killed across the Strip since a ceasefire agreement in October.

events.title: Israeli Settlers Force Palestinian Family to Exhume Father's Body
events.desc: A Palestinian family in Jenin reported that Israeli settlers forced them to exhume their father's body hours after his funeral. The UN condemned the incident as 'appalling and emblematic of the dehumanisation of Palestinians'.

events.title: Russian Air Defense Forces Report Downing Ukrainian Drones Over Belgorod
events.desc: Russian air defense systems successfully intercepted and destroyed multiple Ukrainian drones over the Belgorod region. There were no immediate reports of casualties or significant damage.

events.title: Russia claims to have destroyed Western-supplied air defense system in Ukraine
events.desc: The Russian Ministry of Defense claims its forces destroyed a U.S.-supplied air defense system in Ukraine. The ministry provided no further details regarding the specific system or its location.

events.title: Syria and Lebanon Discuss Joint Interests, Including Security and Transport
events.desc: Syrian and Lebanese officials held talks in Damascus, focusing on collaboration in areas such as security, transport, and energy. The meeting aimed to strengthen bilateral ties and address shared regional interests.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and their corresponding passwords have been leaked online, exposing basic security vulnerabilities within ministries handling classified information. The breach data indicates that 12 out of 13 ministries were affected, potentially compromising sensitive data.
